title: stellarioides cernua

These constituents, including stellarine, cernuine, and stellarinic acid, have been shown to possess anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, making the plant useful for treating various health conditions, including wounds, infections, and oxidative stress. The stems of Stellarioides cernua contain saponins and coumarins, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. side_effects: Stellarioides cernua can have side effects if used improperly, such as dizziness, nausea, and headaches due to its potent alkaloids. Additionally, improper use of Stellarioides cernua has been linked to increased heart rate, blood pressure, and respiratory problems in some individuals.
